name: Lucinate Repo
subtitle: Repository for the Lucinate iOS app
description: An unofficial AltStore/Feather compatible source for Lucinate — an OpenWrt router management app for iOS.

apps.name: Lucinate
apps.subtitle: OpenWrt Router Manager
apps.localizedDescription: Manage your OpenWrt routers from iOS. Monitor clients and throughput, control interfaces and wireless, and manage Tailscale and TravelMate — all with a fast, themeable UI. Built for life on the move.

versions.localizedDescription: Unsigned IPA — sideload with Feather/AltStore. Built from `9799764`.
Unsigned IPA — sideload with Feather/AltStore. Built from `57e7bf9`.
